title: Time to Sparkle 12 Pack Tissue Paper Honeycomb Balls, Poms Birthday Baby Shower Wedding Decorations (Royal Blue)
features: 【Package: 12pcs Mix Set】: 12pcs Mix Honeycomb Balls (Size:6"/15cm + 8"/20cm + 10"/25cm + 12"/30cm); Color:Shown As Pictures

【Advantage】 - Honeycomb Balls are Pre-assembled & Individually packed & Flat packed ready to unfold and each one have a thread attached in order to hang them. All honeycomb Balls made of safe and environmental paper, non-toxic, odorless, fastness (if no solarization) and reusable.

【Occasion】 - Hanging decorations in schools, classrooms, supermarkets; Perfect for baby shower, party, wedding, nursery christenings, festival, birthday decorations or other celebrations, beautiful combinated decorations for most occasions, make your party memorable and impressive.

【Usage】 - Open the honeycomb paper and attach the two backsides with double sided tape to create a ball. Repeat steps to create several ornaments.Or used as wall decorations, just fold out halfway and stick to the wall

【DIY Combination】: Used in lieu of balloons, for they are more lightweight and hassle-free. They can be scattered as dessert table decor, or placed in vases as unique centerpieces. Use this gorgeous decorative paper at your party, you can create a wonderful backdrop for your family or friends.
